# Smart Buyer Hub

> Smart Buyer Hub is an independent Australian mortgage broker and home-loan strategist based in Greater Sydney, helping first home buyers, owner-occupiers, refinancers, property investors and self-employed borrowers secure the right home loan. It compares a panel of 30+ lenders (including the Big 4) across thousands of products. The difference is personal, patient guidance — you deal directly with Ryan, who walks you through every step in plain English, from first question to settlement and every year after. Tagline: "Personal guidance, every step."

## Key facts
- Service: Mortgage broking / home loan advice (independent)
- Location: Greater Sydney, NSW, Australia; serves clients Australia-wide via video
- Lender panel: 30+ lenders including CommBank, Westpac, ANZ, NAB, Macquarie, ING, St.George, Suncorp, Bankwest, ME Bank, Pepper Money, MA Money
- Cost: Free initial strategy session; brokers are typically paid by the lender on settlement
- Contact: ryan@smartbuyerhub.com.au, 0415 353 927
- Availability: 7 days a week, after hours

## Services
- Owner Occupier Loans — upgrading, downsizing, relocating; bridging finance, equity release, loan portability: https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/owner-occupier-loans.html
- Investment Loans — portfolio structuring, standalone securities, interest-only, equity release: https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/investment-loans.html
- First Home Buyers — grants, schemes, low-deposit options, First Home Guarantee: https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/first-home-buyers.html
- Guarantor Loans — family pledge, buy with little or no deposit, avoid LMI: https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/guarantor-loans.html
- Self-Employed Home Loans — flexible income assessment, low-doc/alt-doc and one-year-return options for sole traders, company directors, trusts and contractors: https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/self-employed-loans.html

## Tools
- Mortgage Calculator (offset, extra repayments, full schedule): https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/mortgage-calculator.html
- Borrowing Power Estimator: https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/borrowing-power-estimator.html
- Upfront Cost Calculator (NSW stamp duty, first-home concessions, LMI, fees — true cash to buy): https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/upfront-cost-calculator.html
- Deposit Savings Planner (deposit + costs needed, time to save, 5% First Home Guarantee path): https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/deposit-savings-planner.html
- Investment Cashflow Calculator (weekly after-tax cost, negative gearing, depreciation): https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/investment-cashflow-calculator.html
- Usable Equity Calculator (accessible equity to 80% LVR, indicative next-purchase buying power): https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/usable-equity-calculator.html
- CGT Reform Calculator (2026-27 Budget proposals): https://smartbuyerhub.com.au/cgt-reform-calculator.html

## Common questions
- Does it cost anything? The initial strategy session is free; brokers are usually paid by the lender on settlement, so typically no direct cost to you.
- Can I buy with less than 20% deposit? Yes — via the First Home Guarantee (5%, no LMI), low-deposit loans with LMI,
